name: Create payment instruction
description: IT Payments creates and validates an instruction for the correct payment channel.

name: Submit for compliance screening
description: Payment instruction is provided to compliance controls before release.

name: Compliance GO or NO-GO decision
description: Compliance reviews sanctions AML restricted-party and unusual-risk alerts.

name: Release approved payment
description: IT Payments releases only GO-approved payment instructions.

name: Settlement and reconciliation
description: Settlement team verifies actual settlement and record matching.

name: Automatic payment status update
description: Payment core is updated automatically with settlement outcome.

name: Receive payment for screening
description: Compliance platform receives instruction from payment processing.

name: Run sanctions and AML controls
description: Screen against regulatory and risk data.

name: Return release decision
description: Return GO or NO-GO to IT Payments.

name: Ingest trading activity
description: Input Hub provides activity data to surveillance.

name: Detect surveillance alerts
description: Market-abuse patterns generate alert candidates.

name: Compliance review alert
description: Compliance decides investigation outcome.

name: Receive confirmation
description: Receive external settlement confirmation or account movement.

name: Reconcile record
description: Compare internal record with external movement.

name: Resolve settlement break
description: Investigate and document mismatches.

name: Obtain external source feed
description: Input Hub receives source data.

name: Validate data quality
description: Data Integration assures required quality.

name: Publish feed to consuming systems
description: Validated data is exposed to dependent platforms.

name: Receive access request
description: Access request is recorded.

name: Approve permission
description: Identity Management validates entitlement.

name: Provision and review access
description: Identity Manager provisions and retains evidence.

name: Create service ticket
description: Team member records issue in Ticketing System.

name: Triage level 1 or level 2
description: Service Desk assesses and routes ticket.

name: Resolve and close ticket
description: Resolution is documented.

name: Review system and team dependency
description: EU Regulatory Office examines ICT and processing landscape.

name: Map applicable obligation
description: Identify DORA or GDPR applicability.

name: Record oversight finding
description: Track required remediation or assurance evidence.
